_comment: One-time publish input for the self-bet mission (F-D). NOT named slate.json on purpose — daily-loop.mjs only picks up evergreen missions that ship a slate.json, and this question is meant to resolve exactly once, at the fixed date below, not get republished on a rolling window. Publish with: node server/src/admin.ts publish self-bet publish-input.json 2026-08-12T00:00:00Z — then after that date: node server/src/admin.ts resolve <workunit_id> --auto && node server/src/admin.ts score <workunit_id>.

questions.text: Will github.com/Coputeai/swarming reach 500 GitHub stars by Aug 12, 2026?
